notes: Fills deck slot 1 (counter, global, defaultTitle "Pokédex"). One counter, target 206 = the maximum number of species obtainable in a single Crystal cartridge without trading, chosen by Pierre 2026-06-18 over the 251 full-dex figure.

Target sourced from src-ra-oak: the Oak Challenge subset's "Trainer Red" achievement (ra-id 315284) reads "Defeat Red with all 206 possible Pokémon in the Pokédex", and the Oak badge ladder climbs 46→77→109→142→150→154→170→174→203→206. 206 is the terminal obtainable count.
Single counter (label "Pokédex (species owned)"); confidence normal, no source gap, flaggedItemIds empty.
